summary: Testing completed for route migration (products, calendar, notifications from server.py to separate modules). All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend login and navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Route migration successful - products.py, calendar.py, notifications.py are working correctly
All migrated endpoints respond as expected with proper authentication

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, KPIs Família navigation all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Route migration testing completed. Products routes (GET /api/product-families, POST /api/product-families/seed, GET /api/products-installed, GET /api/productivity-metrics, GET /api/productivity-history), Calendar routes (GET /api/auth/google/status, GET /api/auth/google/login, GET /api/calendar/events), and Notifications routes (GET /api/notifications/vapid-public-key, GET /api/notifications/status, POST /api/notifications/subscribe) all working correctly. Existing routes (jobs, installers, checkins, reports/by-family) continue to work as expected.
